description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The front facade features a large double garage, a paved driveway, and a main entrance flanked by tall windows and a vertical tree. The house has a white exterior with large windows arranged in horizontal rows, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The backyard includes a small green lawn with a round table and chairs, suggesting an outdoor seating area. The upper floor is visible, showing multiple rooms and open spaces, while the overall structure emphasizes simplicity and functionality. The house is surrounded by paved and grassy areas, blending urban and suburban elements.
description: A modern, two-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, a double garage, and a small outdoor seating area on a green lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, main entrance, large windows, driveway, and outdoor seating area with a tree.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the green lawn, and the vertical tree, with minimal window visibility.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back wall with limited window openings and the overall boxy structure of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, side wall, and partial visibility of the backyard lawn.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, flanked by tall windows, no steps, and a paved approach adjacent to a landscaped area.
